title: Ubiquiti UDM-SE - UniFi Dream Machine Special Edition
description: UniFi Dream Machine Special Edition from Ubiquiti is an all-in-one network solution for small or medium-sized businesses. It is a very powerful 1U device to 19" rack and combines the following features: Manageable 8-port Gigabit PoE Switch with one SFP/SFP+ port and VLAN support (6) 802.3af (max. 15,4W/port) + (2) 802.3at (max. 30W/port) Multiple WAN capability via 2.5-Gigabit Ethernet or SFP/SFP+ port UniFi Security Gateway - offers advanced firewall policies and persistent threat management to act as an Intrusion Prevention System (IPS) and Intrusion Detection System (IDS) UniFi Controller - The UniFi Network Controller can provision UniFi devices, map out networks, and quickly manage system traffic UniFi Video - the 3.5" HDD slot is used for storing camera recordings SmartPower Redundant Power System to create an uninterruptible network 1.3" LCM color touchscreen for at-a-glance network monitoring UniFi Dream Machine Special Edition offers significantly higher performance than previous generations of UniFi Security Gateway. The device is equipped with a 4-core ARM Cortex-A57 CPU clocked at 1.7 GHz , 4 GB RAM, and an internal 16GB eMMC storage. With such a device, the iPerf3 throughput test showed a worthy 3.5Gbps Zero Handoff Roaming - uninterrupted transition between APs Wireless uplink (fits where the data cable cannot be reached) Up to 4 SSID Detailed traffic statistics Guest network Load balance of clients Speed limit for each SSID Device Rackmount ears Power cord
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces WAN Ports 2 WAN speed (1) 100/1000/2500Mbps Number of HDD slots 1 Multiple WAN Yes LAN speed (8) 10/100/1000Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes Optical interfaces (2) 1G/10Gbps Other features Touchscreen, Bluetooth Power Power type Mains power (230V), UniFi SmartPower RPS PoE-Out standards 802.3af, 802.3at Redundant power supply Yes PoE Out ports 8 PoE budget [W] 180 Max. power consumption [W] 50 Power via connector/terminal 230V AC Physical characteristics Design Rackmount Chassis design Metal Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 10 up to 40 Weight [g] 4950 Width [mm] 442 Height [mm] 44 Depth [mm] 286 Hardware CPU ARM Cortex-A57 CPU frequency [MHz] 1700 CPU cores 4 Internal storage [MB] 128 GB RAM [MB] 4096
